description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named mac-pwsafe that runs on push requests to the master branch, on pull requests to master, and on workflow dispatch. Use a macos-14 job with read permission to repository contents that checks out the repository, sets build parameters, forces a compatible Xcode version, installs dependencies, builds libyubikey and ykpers from upstream, caches and builds wxWidgets, generates xcconfigs, builds pwsafe, runs coretest, installs language files, creates a dmg, and uploads the dmg as an artifact.
